product_vision: TinyURL is a frictionless public URL shortening service that ensures links are instantly accessible and reliably tracked without user accounts.
product_description: TinyURL is a minimal HTTP service that converts long URLs into short six-character slugs for sharing and instantly redirects traffic back to the original destination. It supports abuse reporting and per-link click analytics.
summary: Public URL shortening with abuse handling and click analytics; serves Link Sharers, Clickers, Marketers, and Administrators.
